user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry for the frustration this has caused. I understand why you’re upset, and I appreciate you taking the time to let us know instead of walking away without giving us a chance to help.

I’d like to look into this right away and do what I can to make it right. Could you please send me the details of what happened, including any error messages, order/account information, or steps you’ve already tried?

Once I have that, I’ll review it carefully and follow up with the best next steps. If this needs a specialist, I’ll make sure it’s routed to the right team.

Thank you for giving us the opportunity to help.

Best,  
[Support Team]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its instructions to draft an empathetic response to a frustrated customer without any refusal or hesitation.
